sprints.name: Infrastructure & Reliability
sprints.rationale: PRIORITY 1 — SCALE RISK: Foundation work that de-risks scaling. Database migration prevents data corruption under concurrent load. Structured logging and error tracking are operational necessities before supporting paying customers. Execute before or in parallel with Client Impact sprint.

items.title: SQLite migration (from JSON-on-disk)
items.notes: Shipped (all 5 PRs merged) — Migrated from JSON file persistence to SQLite via better-sqlite3 (WAL mode, foreign keys ON). Devin implemented as 5 stacked PRs, all merged to main: (1) DB foundation + payments, (2) 7 global singletons (users, client-users, activity-log, requests, churn-signals, anomaly-detection, scheduled-audits), (3) 14 per-workspace modules (approvals, content-briefs, content-requests, content-posts, work-orders, recommendations, annotations, seo-change-tracker, content-decay, roi, feedback, rank-tracking), (4) 7 per-site/config modules (reports, schema-store, redirect-store, performance-store, chat-memory, google-auth tokens, usage-tracking), (5) workspaces table (30+ columns) + page_edit_states + seo_edit_tracking with FK→workspaces, WorkspaceRow→rowToWorkspace() mapper. Architecture: server/db/index.ts singleton, SQL migrations in server/db/migrations/, migrate-json.ts one-time idempotent JSON→SQLite script, lazy prepared statements, JSON columns for complex data, row→model mappers. Zero modules remain on JSON-on-disk.

items.title: Critical-path E2E tests
items.notes: Shipped — Playwright E2E tests in tests/e2e/: smoke.spec.ts (server health + page load), approval-workflow.spec.ts (propose → review → apply), client-login.spec.ts (auth flow + JWT). Devin PR #35.

items.title: Error monitoring & observability (Sentry)
items.notes: Shipped — server/sentry.ts (initSentry, auto-tags workspaceId from URLs, conditional tracesSampleRate) + @sentry/react frontend ErrorBoundary. CSP updated for Sentry ingest. Conditional source maps via SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN. Devin PRs #32, #34.

items.title: Structured logging (replace console.log)
items.notes: Shipped — server/logger.ts: Pino structured JSON logging. createLogger(module) for child loggers, pretty-print in dev via pino-pretty, JSON in prod. LOG_LEVEL env var. All server modules migrated from console.log. Devin PR #31.

items.title: API documentation (OpenAPI/Swagger spec)
items.notes: 48 route files with no formal API docs beyond the code itself. If you bring on another developer or a client asks for API access, this becomes a blocker. Auto-generate OpenAPI spec from route definitions using tsoa or swagger-jsdoc. Host interactive docs at /api/docs. Document auth requirements, request/response schemas, and error codes for all public and admin endpoints.

items.title: Backend unit tests (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — Comprehensive backend unit tests in tests/unit/ covering core modules: activity-log, auth, broadcast, content-brief, helpers, middleware, openai-helpers, payments, seo-audit, stripe-config, usage-tracking, webflow, workspaces. Vitest-based.

items.title: API integration tests (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — API integration tests in tests/integration/ covering: activity, auth, client-auth, content-briefs, health, public-portal, rank-tracking, settings, webflow, workspaces. Supertest-based against Express app.

items.title: Frontend component tests (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — Frontend component tests in tests/component/ covering UI primitives: Badge, DataList, EmptyState, MetricRing, PageHeader, SectionCard, Skeleton, StatCard, StatusBadge, TabBar, TierGate. Plus smoke test. Vitest + Testing Library.

items.title: Security fixes (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — Path traversal fix in moveUploadedFiles (middleware.ts). Removed duplicate Stripe webhook route that could bypass signature verification.

items.title: React Router DOM migration (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — Migrated from manual routing to react-router-dom v7. BrowserRouter with Routes/Route in App.tsx. src/routes.ts defines Page + ClientTab types, adminPath() + clientPath() helpers. Admin: /ws/:workspaceId/:tab?, Client: /client/:workspaceId/:tab?, global tabs: /settings, /roadmap, /prospect, /ai-usage. Server index.ts further decomposed to ~131 lines.

items.title: Shared types between client and server (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — Extracted shared/types/ with 10 modules: workspace, analytics, content, payments, approvals, requests, recommendations, users, roadmap, index (barrel). Canonical interfaces shared between frontend and backend. Eliminates type duplication.

items.title: Typed API client layer (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — src/api/ with 9 modules: client.ts (ApiError, get/post/patch/del/postForm/getOptional/getSafe), analytics, workspaces, content, seo, payments, auth, misc, index (barrel). All components migrated from raw fetch() to typed API client. 429 detection via ApiError.status.

items.title: Dead code cleanup (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — Removed dead InsightsDigest onNavigate prop, fixed auth middleware /ws/ allowlist.

items.title: Route-level integration tests (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — Route-level integration tests for 12 previously untested route modules. Supertest-based.

items.title: CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions) (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — .github/workflows/ci.yml (lint, type-check, unit/integration tests, build) + e2e.yml (Playwright tests). Idempotent migration inserts to prevent CI race conditions.

items.title: Graceful shutdown (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers: flush email queue, close DB, close WebSocket with reentrancy guard, clean exit. try/catch wraps flush calls to prevent skipping db.close() on disk errors.

items.title: Off-site backups (S3) (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — Optional S3 upload after local backup via BACKUP_S3_BUCKET env var. Cleans up tar.gz archive on upload failure. AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID/AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY for credentials. BACKUP_S3_REGION and BACKUP_S3_PREFIX configurable.

items.title: API hardening (rate limits, Turnstile, fingerprinting) (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — Rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-*), Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA on client login/forgot-password (optional via VITE_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY + TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY), request fingerprinting, credential stuffing protection on auth endpoints.

items.title: Security audit CI workflow (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — .github/workflows/security.yml: weekly npm audit (Monday 9am UTC) + on every PR. Checks high-severity first, fails on critical. Also pinned Vite to stable 8.0.0.

items.title: Backup integrity verification (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — PRAGMA integrity_check on backup copy after SQLite backup. Verifies backup is not corrupted before optional S3 upload.

items.title: Background job persistence to SQLite (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — server/jobs.ts rewritten with SQLite write-through cache (migration 006-jobs.sql). Jobs survive server restarts. Running/pending jobs marked as interrupted during graceful shutdown. server/app.ts extracted (~301 lines) from index.ts for testability. websocket.ts (~130 lines) and startup.ts (~22 lines) also extracted. middleware/ directory with fingerprint.ts, request-logger.ts, turnstile.ts.

items.title: SQLite busy_timeout pragma (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — busy_timeout(5000) pragma in server/db/index.ts to prevent SQLITE_BUSY errors in parallel test workers and concurrent requests.

sprints.name: Content Pipeline Completion
sprints.rationale: PRIORITY 2: Close the brief → publish → measure loop. Enable recurring content revenue. The pipeline is built — now close the last-mile gap.

items.title: Client onboarding wizard
items.notes: Shipped — 3-step guided first-run (welcome → tour → actions). Tier-aware feature grid, suggested actions based on connected data.

items.title: "What happened this month" summary
items.notes: Shipped — MonthlySummary component. Removed from client overview in declutter pass (redundant with InsightsDigest).

items.title: Content performance tracker
items.notes: Shipped — getPageTrend, /api/content-performance/:workspaceId, ContentPerformance.tsx with GSC+GA4 per-post data.

items.title: AI anomaly detection
items.notes: Shipped — anomaly-detection.ts: 28-day period comparison for GSC+GA4+audit. 12h scheduler. Admin+public APIs. AnomalyAlerts in WorkspaceHome (admin).

items.title: Brand voice & personas auto-generation
items.notes: Shipped — One-click auto-generation from website crawl. Consolidated into Brand & AI Hub (BrandHub.tsx).

items.title: Auto-publish to Webflow CMS
items.notes: Shipped — Full pipeline: createCollectionItem API, HTML→rich-text converter, field mapping config with AI suggestions, DALL-E featured image generation, publish endpoint, PublishSettings admin UI, publish buttons in PostEditor/ContentManager, auto-publish on approval. Brief → AI generates → client approves → one-click publish to Webflow CMS collection.

items.title: Recurring content subscriptions
items.notes: Shipped — 3 plans (Starter $500/2 posts, Growth $900/4 posts, Scale $1600/8 posts). Full Stripe subscription lifecycle (checkout, renewal, cancellation, past-due). DB migration, server CRUD module, API routes, admin UI with plan creation/pause/resume/delivery tracking, client UI on Plans tab with checkout + status. Webhook handlers for all subscription events. create-stripe-products script updated with recurring prices.

items.title: Platform revenue dashboard in Command Center
items.notes: Admin-only revenue dashboard: total MRR, revenue by workspace, revenue by product type (tiers, content, fixes, hours), MoM growth chart, payment history. Data from payments.ts + Stripe.

items.title: Content calendar
items.notes: Visual calendar/timeline view of content in production with due dates. Shows briefs, posts, and published content. Essential interface for recurring content subscriptions (#111). Elevated from P2 — becomes the primary pipeline management UI once subscriptions are live.

items.title: Brief regeneration with feedback
items.notes: Re-generate a content brief with user instructions: 'make it more commercial', 'add a comparison table section'. Re-prompt with context from previous version + user feedback. Preserves version history.

items.title: Client brief export (download/print)
items.notes: Let clients download or print a polished branded HTML brief. Currently admin-only via renderBriefHTML(). Add public endpoint + download button in client Inbox.

items.title: Data export / portability (CSV/JSON)
items.notes: CSV/JSON export for key datasets: audit history, keyword strategy, content briefs, ROI data, activity log. Reduces churn anxiety ('what if I leave?') and is often a procurement requirement for larger agency clients. Add export buttons to Strategy, Health, ROI, and Content tabs. Server endpoints return formatted CSV or JSON.

items.title: Content versioning for generated posts
items.notes: Shipped — SQLite content_post_versions table (migration 009). Auto-snapshots before section regeneration, manual edits, and reverts. API: list/get/revert versions. PostEditor History panel with version timeline and one-click revert. Feature #113.

items.title: Human-in-the-loop post review checklist
items.notes: Shipped — 6-item review checklist (factual accuracy, brand voice, internal links, no hallucinations, meta optimized, word count target). Persisted in review_checklist JSON column (migration 010). Collapsible panel in PostEditor with progress counter. Send to Review button disabled until all items checked. Feature #114.

sprints.name: Self-Service & Distribution
sprints.rationale: PRIORITY 3: Remove admin bottleneck. Enable organic acquisition at scale via OAuth self-service and Webflow Marketplace.

items.title: AI chatbot: multi-modal responses
items.notes: Shipped — Rich fenced code blocks in AI chat: metric, chart, datatable, sparkline. ChatBlocks.tsx + RenderMarkdown + RICH_BLOCKS_PROMPT.

items.title: Self-service Webflow connection onboarding
items.notes: OAuth Webflow App for zero-instruction client connection. Conditional OnboardingWizard step. Prerequisite for Marketplace listing (#119).

items.title: GSC/GA4 self-service OAuth connection
items.notes: Client connects Google Search Console and GA4 via OAuth consent screen. Phase 2 of self-service (Phase 1 = Webflow).

items.title: Admin onboarding / first-run experience
items.notes: 7-step checklist on empty command center: create workspace, link Webflow, connect GSC, connect GA4, run audit, set client password, configure email.

items.title: Webflow App Marketplace listing
items.notes: Register as official Webflow App → appear in Marketplace → one-click install. Zero-cost distribution channel. Depends on OAuth (#100).

items.title: White-label domain support
items.notes: CNAME + reverse proxy. Configurable branding (logo, colors, favicon, email sender, chatbot persona). Agency resale tiers ($299-999/mo). Moved from Sprint C — fits better with distribution/growth.

items.title: Public API rate limiting & bot protection
items.notes: Shipped — 5-layer public API hardening: (1) Rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-Limit/Remaining/Reset, Retry-After) on all limiters. (2) New limiters: aiLimiter 3/min on /api/admin-chat, globalPublicLimiter 200/min per IP (global key) on all /api/public/*. (3) Credential stuffing protection: per-email failed login tracking with 15-min lockout after 5 failures. (4) Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA on client-login and forgot-password (optional, skips if env vars unset). TurnstileWidget component with single-use token reset. (5) Request fingerprinting: SHA-256(IP+UA+Accept-Language) logged for abuse detection. CSP updated for challenges.cloudflare.com. All backward compatible.

sprints.name: Admin Polish & DX
sprints.rationale: PRIORITY 4: Small improvements that compound UX quality. Each item is low-effort, high-polish. Run in parallel with or between larger sprints.

items.title: Storage optimization & monitoring
items.notes: Shipped — Phase 1+2: server/storage-stats.ts scans all data directories (25 categories + uploads + optimized). GET /api/admin/storage-stats returns per-directory breakdown with bytes, file count, labels. POST endpoints for pruning: /prune-chat (>90 day sessions), /prune-backups (keep 3 days), /prune-activity (>6 month entries). Storage Monitor UI panel in SettingsPanel.tsx: colored stacked bar chart, per-category row breakdown, chat/backup/oldest stats, one-click prune buttons with toast feedback. Phase 3 (SQLite migration) shipped separately as #211.

items.title: AdminChat improvements
items.notes: Shipped — Major overhaul: (1) Server-side context assembly (admin-chat-context.ts) replaces frontend pre-fetching — question-aware smart loading from 20+ data sources. (2) Page-specific analysis — paste a URL to get targeted audit/GSC/keyword/scrape data. (3) Content review mode — paste long text for editorial feedback with brand voice + SEO. (4) Three chat modes: analyst, page_reviewer, content_reviewer. (5) Wired 10+ new data sources: content briefs, content requests, rank tracking, content decay, work orders, SEO change tracker, AI recommendations, churn signals, anomalies, activity log, audience personas. (6) Resizable panel — drag left/top edges or corner to resize (360–720px width, 380–800px height). (7) Dock mode — toggle between floating bubble and full-height right sidebar. (8) Adopted ChatPanel.tsx shared primitive with pinned input bar.

items.title: Brand docs upload UI
items.notes: readBrandDocs() reads from workspace brand-docs/ folder but no UI exists to upload/manage files. Add drag-and-drop upload section to BrandHub.tsx. Quick win that makes knowledge base self-service.

items.title: Dark/light mode polish for admin
items.notes: Audit admin components for light-mode rendering.

items.title: WorkspaceHome data freshness indicators
items.notes: Last updated timestamps, stale data warning. Trust signal.

items.title: Consistent back navigation patterns
items.notes: Contextual back link, lightweight nav stack.

items.title: Sidebar tool descriptions / tooltips
items.notes: Hover tooltips on sidebar items. Complements the new colored group header icons.

items.title: Heavy dependency audit / tree-shaking
items.notes: Verify Lucide tree-shaking, audit chart libs.

items.title: Onboarding-integrated SEO education
items.notes: Per-tab first-visit tooltip tours, onboarding wizard AI integration, optional 'SEO Basics' learning path. Builds on #191 and #192. Moved from Sprint B.

items.title: Loading skeleton for client dashboard first load
items.notes: Shipped — Skeleton.tsx UI primitive with shimmer animation. Applied to client dashboard data loading across tabs (OverviewTab metric cards, HealthTab score ring, PerformanceTab charts, StrategyTab keyword table). Centralized number formatting utilities shipped alongside.

items.title: Recharts migration (all custom SVG charts)
items.notes: Shipped — Migrated all hand-rolled SVG charts across admin and client dashboards to Recharts library. Covers: traffic trends, search performance, GA4 metrics, rank tracking, content performance, anomaly charts, roadmap velocity. ResponsiveContainer + LineChart/AreaChart/BarChart with XAxis/YAxis/Tooltip.

items.title: AI Usage Dashboard in Command Center
items.notes: Shipped — GET /api/ai/usage returns per-feature token consumption with timestamps, model, estimated cost. Dashboard: total tokens, cost estimate, per-feature breakdown, SEMRush credit tracking via usage-tracking.ts. Filterable by workspace and date range.

items.title: Mobile Guard interstitial
items.notes: Shipped — MobileGuard.tsx: dismissible interstitial on <768px screens recommending desktop. sessionStorage persistence. Re-checks on resize.

items.title: Client Onboarding Questionnaire
items.notes: Shipped — ClientOnboardingQuestionnaire.tsx: structured multi-step intake form collecting business info, goals, audience, competitors, content preferences. Feeds into workspace AI context.

items.title: Decompose monolith components (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — Decomposed 6 large components into extracted module directories: SeoAudit → audit/ (ScoreTrendChart, ActionItemsPanel, AuditHistory), ContentBriefs → briefs/ (BriefDetail), SchemaSuggester → schema/ (CmsTemplatePanel), KeywordStrategy → strategy/ (SeoCopyPanel), AssetBrowser → assets/ (OrganizePreview), WorkspaceSettings → settings/ (ConnectionsTab, FeaturesTab, ClientDashboardTab). Also split server/routes/webflow.ts into 5 domain-specific route files. Fixed useState→useEffect, clientEmail sync, duplicate CMS loader bugs.

items.title: UX improvements batch (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — useToast hook (removed setTimeout auto-dismiss duplication), ARIA roles on TabBar + PerformanceTab, centralized duplicate number formatting utilities, Chat/FeedbackWidget overlap fix on mobile, mobile-friendly date picker popover, extracted ContentTab API logic into useContentRequests hook, reverted batch approve to sequential to avoid race condition.

items.title: Medium/low UI/UX audit fixes (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — Implemented all 12 medium/low priority UI/UX audit fixes from CLIENT_DASHBOARD_UX_AUDIT.md and ADMIN_UX_AUDIT.md.

sprints.name: SEO Intelligence Expansion
sprints.rationale: PRIORITY 5: Deeper competitive and technical SEO capabilities that differentiate the platform.

items.title: Competitive intelligence hub (in Strategy tab)
items.notes: Phased: (1) Keyword Gap Analysis via SEMRush getKeywordGap() — 3-4h, (2) Content Gap Analysis via sitemap comparison — 2-3h, (3) Competitive Monitoring via automated audits — 2-3h, (4) SERP Overlap Dashboard — 2-3h. Reuses existing infrastructure.

items.title: AI-powered internal linking engine
items.notes: Scan all pages → AI identifies contextual linking opportunities → generate anchor text → preview → one-click implement via Webflow API. Ongoing orphan page detection.

items.title: GSC 404 import for redirect scanner
items.notes: Pull crawl errors from GSC to seed redirect scanner in Links tab.

items.title: Audit historical trend charts
items.notes: Track audit score over time per-page, not just site-wide.

items.title: Bulk page operations in SEO Editor
items.notes: Select multiple pages → apply same fix pattern (e.g., append brand name to all titles). Checkbox multi-select, bulk AI rewrite, preview diff, one-click apply.

items.title: Lightweight backlink profile overview
items.notes: Quick win using existing SEMRush integration (getDomainOrganic already available). Show: total backlinks, referring domains count, top 10 referring domains, new/lost backlinks trend (30d). Add as sub-section in Strategy tab or standalone panel. Backlinks are a top-3 ranking factor — even a basic view strengthens premium tier value prop significantly. Full backlink intelligence (#110) is a separate, larger effort.

sprints.name: Team & Collaboration
sprints.rationale: PRIORITY 6: Multi-user support for growing agencies. Execute when team size or client demands justify it.

items.title: Internal team management
items.notes: Invite team members, manage roles, assign workspaces.

items.title: Permission-based feature access
items.notes: Fine-grained: client_member view-only on approvals, member can't delete workspaces.

items.title: Writer assignment
items.notes: Assign content briefs to specific writers with notifications.

items.title: Client team collaboration
items.notes: Comments on strategy items, @mentions on briefs, shared notes. Per-seat pricing opportunity.

items.title: Notification preferences
items.notes: Per-user email settings, digest frequency.

sprints.name: Backlog
sprints.rationale: Revisit quarterly. Prioritize when a specific client need, revenue opportunity, or scale threshold justifies it.

items.title: Strategy & implementation hours system
items.notes: Premium includes 3 strategy & implementation hrs/mo. Defer until premium tier has more subscribers.

items.title: Webhook / Zapier triggers
items.notes: Fire webhooks on key events. Enables automation integrations.

items.title: Responsive mobile layout
items.notes: Sidebar → bottom nav, stacked cards on small screens.

items.title: Shared notes / wiki per workspace
items.notes: Team-internal notes about a client.

items.title: Client NPS survey
items.notes: Periodic in-dashboard satisfaction survey.

items.title: Schema auto-schedule
items.notes: Re-generate schemas on cadence, flag stale pages.

items.title: Historical redirect comparison
items.notes: Track redirect status over time, detect new 404s.

items.title: Full-site PageSpeed scan
items.notes: Multi-page PSI scan as background job.

items.title: Accessibility audit expansion
items.notes: WCAG contrast, ARIA, heading order, form labels.

items.title: WCAG AA full compliance
items.notes: Focus indicators, keyboard nav for all interactive elements.

items.title: Schema generator → gpt-4o upgrade
items.notes: CONDITIONAL: Blocked by 30K TPM limit.

items.title: GSC: URL Inspection API
items.notes: Per-URL indexing status, crawl info.

items.title: GA4: Exit pages + attribution
items.notes: Advanced analytics.

items.title: Webflow Enterprise API: 301 redirects
items.notes: Push rules via API (Enterprise-only).

items.title: Sales report: branded PDF export
items.notes: Downloadable prospect reports with agency branding.

items.title: Sales report: email delivery
items.notes: Send reports directly to prospects.

items.title: Sales report: CRM integration
items.notes: Push prospect data to HubSpot/Pipedrive.

items.title: Predictive SEO & trend forecasting
items.notes: Historical GSC data + Google Trends API + seasonal patterns → predict growing keywords 30-90 days out.

items.title: Cross-client benchmarking network
items.notes: Anonymized benchmarks across all clients. Needs 20+ active clients.

items.title: Backlink intelligence & outreach
items.notes: Ahrefs/Moz API → backlink profile → link gaps → AI outreach templates. Elevated from P3 — backlinks are a top-3 ranking factor and this capability justifies premium pricing. Lightweight overview (#213) ships first in Sprint F; this is the full-featured follow-up.

items.title: Local SEO module
items.notes: GBP integration, local keyword tracking, citation monitoring. Add-on $99-149/mo.

items.title: AI strategy memory & learning
items.notes: AI learns from conversations, approved changes, rejected suggestions. Proprietary knowledge asset.

items.title: WordPress / Shopify support
items.notes: Abstract CMS integration layer. Only after Webflow PMF proven.

items.title: Embeddable SEO widgets
items.notes: Embeddable site health badge, traffic counter. Passive referral generation.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — UI/UX Audit & Polish
sprints.rationale: Quality-of-life improvements across admin and client dashboards. Anomaly spam prevention, navigation clarity, content pipeline visibility, and positive framing for client-facing insights.

items.title: Anomaly detection deploy guard
items.notes: Shipped — Tracks last scan time in SQLite, skips startup scan if last scan < 6h ago. Prevents anomaly email spam on frequent deploys.

items.title: Admin nav: white text + neutral inactive icons
items.notes: Shipped — Changed inactive nav text from text-zinc-500 to text-zinc-300. Changed all group inactive icons from colored tints (e.g. text-teal-500/40) to neutral text-zinc-500. Fixes SEO items always appearing active.

items.title: Growth Opportunities reframe (client Strategy tab)
items.notes: Shipped — Reframed 'Not Yet Ranking' as 'Growth Opportunities' with teal/positive styling instead of red/alarming. Opportunity-focused diagnostic messages. 'Almost there' badge for near-ranking pages.

items.title: Content pipeline status cards + post-publish performance
items.notes: Shipped — (1) Status summary cards at top of Content tab (Needs Review, In Progress, Delivered, Published). (2) Post-publish GSC/GA4 performance snippet on delivered/published items with clicks, impressions, CTR, position. New public endpoint: GET /api/public/content-performance/:workspaceId.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Client Impact & Retention
sprints.rationale: PRIORITY 2 — COMPETITIVE MOAT: Make existing clients see undeniable value. SEO change impact tracking is the hardest thing for competitors to replicate. Shareable reports reduce churn by reaching budget-holders. Content refresh engine justifies ongoing subscriptions.

items.title: ROI dashboard (Growth+)
items.notes: Shipped — Organic traffic value (GSC clicks × CPC), ad spend equivalent, page breakdown table. GET /api/public/roi/:wsId. Growth+ only tab.

items.title: Self-service tier upgrade via Stripe
items.notes: Shipped — plan_growth/plan_premium product types, Stripe Checkout for tier upgrades, webhook auto-upgrades tier, all mailto links replaced. Fixed: tier changes now broadcast workspace:updated via WebSocket so client dashboards update in real-time without page refresh.

items.title: Churn prevention signals
items.notes: Shipped — 6h scheduler: no-login-14d, chat-dropoff, no-requests-30d, health-drop, trial-ending, payment-failed, high-engagement. Admin API: list, per-ws, dismiss.

items.title: Usage tracking + limits
items.notes: Shipped — server/usage-tracking.ts: per-workspace monthly counters for ai_chats, content_briefs, strategy_generations. Per-tier limits (free: 3/1/0, growth: 50/10/3, premium: unlimited). checkUsageLimit + incrementUsage wired into strategy gen, brief gen (both endpoints), and client chat. Unified GET /api/public/usage/:wsId endpoint. 429 responses with upgrade prompts.

items.title: Production Stripe keys (live payments)
items.notes: Shipped — stripe-config.ts: AES-256-GCM encrypted on-disk persistence for Stripe keys + product Price IDs. StripeSettings.tsx admin UI for key management. clearTestModeCustomerIds() auto-cleans on startup when using live keys. Webhook handler production-ready.

items.title: Real-time tier sync to client dashboard
items.notes: Shipped — Admin workspace updates and Stripe tier upgrades were not propagating to client dashboards in real-time. Fix: broadcastToWorkspace for admin update + initStripeBroadcast for Stripe webhooks + workspace:updated handler in ClientDashboard.tsx.

items.title: ROI month-over-month growth tracking
items.notes: Shipped — roi.ts: ROI history snapshots saved to data/roi-history/, loadHistory/saveSnapshot/computeGrowthPercent compares current value to ~30-day-old snapshot (15-45 day window). ROIDashboard.tsx: third hero card now shows MoM growth % (teal for positive, amber for negative) with fallback to Pages Tracked when no history exists yet.

items.title: SEO change impact tracking
items.notes: Shipped — Implemented as SEO Change Performance Tracker (roadmap #231). server/seo-change-tracker.ts records every SEO/schema change with timestamp, compares GSC before/after (28-day windows with 3-day delay). SeoChangeImpact.tsx on Workspace Home shows changes + 'Compare GSC Impact' button with delta badges (clicks, impressions, CTR, position). Hooked into all update flows: editor, bulk-fix, approvals, jobs, schema publish, CMS template publish.

items.title: Shareable client reports
items.notes: Shipped — Monthly report persistence (saveMonthlyReport/listSavedReports/getSavedReport in monthly-report.ts). Public permalink route /report/monthly/:id. Unified report listing API /api/public/reports/:workspaceId (audit + monthly combined). Share Report dropdown in HealthTab with copy-link and open-in-new-tab per report. Reports saved on both manual trigger and auto-send.

items.title: Content published email notification
items.notes: Shipped — content_published EmailEventType + renderContentPublished template in email-templates.ts. notifyClientContentPublished in email.ts. Wired into PATCH /api/content-requests/:wsId/:id when status='published'. Branded email with topic, target keyword, and dashboard CTA.

items.title: Content refresh / decay engine
items.notes: Shipped — content-decay.ts: analyzeContentDecay compares current 30d vs previous 30d GSC data, flags pages with >10% click decline. Severity tiers: critical (>50%), warning (>30%), watch (>10%). AI refresh recommendations via GPT-4.1-mini per decaying page. Admin UI: ContentDecay.tsx lazy-loaded sub-tab in SeoAudit with summary cards, severity filters, expandable page details, AI recommendation display. Routes: POST /api/content-decay/:wsId/analyze, GET cached, POST recommendations. Public endpoint for client dashboard.

items.title: Work order real-time broadcast
items.notes: Shipped — broadcastToWorkspace(wsId, 'work-order:update', ...) added to PATCH /api/work-orders/:wsId/:orderId. WORK_ORDER_UPDATE added to ws-events.ts registry. Client dashboard now receives real-time work order status updates.

items.title: Server refactor: index.ts → 48 route modules
items.notes: Shipped — Split server/index.ts from ~8,300 lines into ~450 lines + 48 Express Router files in server/routes/ + 3 shared modules (broadcast.ts, helpers.ts, middleware.ts). Each route file owns one domain. Zero endpoint changes — pure refactor. Initial split was 38 files; decompose-monoliths PR added 10 more (webflow-alt-text, webflow-audit, webflow-cms, webflow-keywords, webflow-organize, webflow-analysis, webflow-pagespeed, webflow-schema, webflow-seo, content-decay).

items.title: AI Context Completeness Indicator
items.notes: Shipped — server/ai-context-check.ts checks 8 AI data sources (Webflow, GSC, GA4, Knowledge Base, Brand Voice, Personas, Keyword Strategy, SEMRush) per workspace. GET /api/ai/context/:workspaceId returns score, connected/total, per-source status + detail + fix actions. AIContextIndicator.tsx reusable UI component with expandable detail, feature filtering, navigation links. Wired into ContentBriefs + KeywordStrategy.

items.title: AI context enrichment audit
items.notes: Shipped — Full audit of all AI-powered features for context completeness. Fixes: (1) content-brief.ts persists real SERP data (PAA + top results) on briefs. (2) keyword-strategy.ts master synthesis receives knowledge base for better content gap alignment. (3) Client chat receives structured SEO context (keyword strategy + brand voice + keyword map) matching admin chat. (4) internal-links.ts receives knowledge base for better anchor text.

items.title: Beta client feedback & bug submission
items.notes: Shipped — Floating feedback widget (bottom-left, client portal). Bug/feature/general types with auto-context capture. Per-workspace disk storage. Admin Command Center feed with status workflow + threaded replies. Email notification + activity log on submission. WebSocket broadcast for real-time updates.

items.title: Contextual SEO explainers (tooltips + glossary)
items.notes: Shipped — SeoGlossary.tsx: 25-term glossary map (CTR, impressions, clicks, position, bounce rate, engagement rate, site health, meta title/description, keyword difficulty, search volume, organic traffic, backlinks, indexing, schema, canonical, redirect, crawling, content gap, quick win, ROI, sessions, pageviews, conversions). Reusable <Explainer term='ctr' /> component: click-to-expand popover with definition, why it matters, benchmarks. Wired into OverviewTab stat cards (Search Clicks, Impressions, Site Health, Avg Position) and SearchTab (Search Health Summary CTR label, all data table column headers). Phase 2 TODO: contextual tips using actual workspace data.

items.title: AI chatbot SEO tutor mode
items.notes: Shipped — SEO EDUCATOR MODE section added to client chatbot system prompt in server/index.ts: plain-English explanations first, then connect to client's actual data with benchmarks, use simple analogies, never condescending. LEARN_SEO_QUESTIONS array in types.ts: 5 educational quick questions ('Explain my site health score', 'What is CTR and why does it matter', 'What are impressions vs clicks', 'How does SEO help my business', 'What is a keyword strategy'). Wired into: OverviewTab sidebar 'New to SEO?' section, ClientDashboard chat empty state, and chat follow-up suggestions after proactive greeting. Emerald-colored 💡 buttons distinguish educational questions from data questions.

items.title: AI blog post generator (brief → full post)
items.notes: Shipped — content-posts.ts: section-by-section generation with page-type-specific writer roles (blog, landing, service, location, product, pillar, resource). Full context per section: brand voice, keyword strategy, E-E-A-T, SERP analysis, internal link suggestions. Post-generation unification pass (unifyPost) smooths transitions, removes cross-section repetition, ensures consistent voice, and trims word count to brief target when over budget. GPT-4.1 at temp 0.4 for editorial refinement. Admin Content Manager tab (ContentManager.tsx) for reviewing/managing all generated posts with status workflow (draft→review→approved), search/sort, and inline PostEditor. SEMRush graceful error handling: getRelatedKeywords/getDomainOrganic return [] instead of throwing on NOTHING FOUND. Audit fixes (Mar 10): fixed duplicate post bug, word count budgets, maxTokens tuning, SERP override, unification trimming, dynamic maxTokens, unificationStatus tracking, previous section context 600→1200 chars. HTML output (Mar 10): clean HTML generation, SEO meta generation step, PostEditor HTML rendering. Content quality engine v5 (Mar 10): WRITING_QUALITY_RULES — forbidden phrases (AI clichés, corporate buzzwords, hollow intensifiers, vague attribution, Let's+verb, Ready to+verb), structural anti-patterns, fabrication rules (no invented stats, directional case study outcomes), anchor text accuracy, mandatory H3 subheadings for 200+ word sections. Brief-level rules: H3 subheadings in outline schema, case study anonymity, FAQ word budget (150+ words), industry diversity (max 2 sections per industry), section count (5-7 for blogs), buzzword bans, reader-perspective executive summary, single-slash internal link paths. Full sitemap via getAllSitePages helper (Webflow API + CMS sitemap pages) for comprehensive internal link suggestions. Internal links use workspace liveDomain for correct URLs.

items.title: Admin sidebar restructure + request widget
items.notes: Shipped — Reorganized admin sidebar from 4 groups/18 items to 4 groups/14 items. New structure: ANALYTICS (Search Console, GA, Rank Tracker, Annotations), SITE HEALTH (Site Audit, Performance, Links [merged Redirects+Internal Links], Assets), SEO (Brand & AI [moved to top], Strategy, Editor, Schema), CONTENT (Content Briefs, Content, Content Performance). Removed Competitors tab from sidebar (component retained, future competitive intelligence will live in Strategy per #199). Moved Requests to header bar as badge widget alongside NotificationBell. Merged Redirects + Internal Links into single Links tab with sub-tabs.

items.title: Sidebar group colored icons + visual polish
items.notes: Shipped — Added colored lucide icons to sidebar group headers: Activity (blue) for ANALYTICS, Shield (emerald) for SITE HEALTH, Zap (teal) for SEO, BookOpen (amber) for CONTENT. Hover opacity transition, moved chevron to right side, increased padding for visual weight.

items.title: Roadmap shipping velocity chart + sprint restructure
items.notes: Shipped — (1) SVG shipping velocity chart in Roadmap.tsx showing cumulative features shipped per month with teal gradient area chart. (2) Full roadmap restructure: renamed Sprint B → Client Impact & Retention, Sprint C → Content Pipeline Completion, Sprint D → Self-Service & Distribution. Created 3 new sprints: Sprint E (Admin Polish & DX), Sprint F (SEO Intelligence Expansion), Sprint G (Team & Collaboration). Added 4 new items: #201 brief regeneration, #202 client brief export, #203 brand docs upload UI, #204 bulk SEO editor operations. Trimmed backlog from 30+ unsorted items to 24 organized items.

items.title: Not Yet Ranking action plan in Strategy tab
items.notes: Shipped — Expandable 'Not Yet Ranking' section in StrategyTab between Content Opportunities and Quick Wins. Per-page breakdown of unranked pages (no currentPosition in pageMap). Diagnosis engine: near-ranking (has impressions), high KD, moderate KD, or likely not indexed/thin content. Priority sorting: commercial/transactional intent first, pages with impressions above zero-impression, lower KD more fixable. Each page expandable with: diagnosis reasons, GSC metrics (impressions, clicks), keyword metrics (volume, KD%), recommended action with icon, 'Get Content Brief' CTA with pricing. Red gradient card with AlertTriangle icon, collapsible by default.

items.title: Client audit completion email notification
items.notes: Shipped — audit_complete EmailEventType + renderAuditComplete template in email-templates.ts. Shows site health score, score delta (improved/declined), top 3 remaining issues by severity, fixed issues count (compared to previous snapshot via getLatestSnapshotBefore). notifyClientAuditComplete in email.ts. Wired into both manual audit (jobs.ts) and scheduled audit (scheduled-audits.ts) completion flows. CTA links to Health tab.

items.title: Client path-based routing migration (Devin)
items.notes: Shipped — Migrated client portal from query-param routing (?tab=X) to path-based routing (/client/:workspaceId/:tab?). Backward-compatible redirect from old ?tab=X URLs. Cleaner URLs, better analytics tracking, SEO-friendly.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Launch Readiness
sprints.rationale: PRIORITY 0 — LAUNCH BLOCKER: Items that must ship before go-to-market. Stripe recurring billing is a hard blocker (can’t charge monthly without subscriptions). Email capture unlocks the growth loop. Easy wins are high-impact, low-effort polish items that improve first impressions and conversion.

items.title: Stripe recurring billing for tier subscriptions
items.notes: Shipped — createCheckoutSession in server/stripe.ts now detects plan_growth/plan_premium and uses mode:'subscription' with subscription_data metadata. Added webhook handlers for customer.subscription.created/updated/deleted, invoice.paid, invoice.payment_failed. Subscription lifecycle: active → sets tier + stores stripeSubscriptionId; deleted → downgrades to free; past_due → activity log warning. Added createBillingPortalSession() for Stripe Customer Portal self-service. New routes: POST /api/public/billing-portal/:wsId, POST /api/public/cancel-subscription/:wsId. PlansTab shows 'Manage Billing' button for paid subscribers. cancelSubscription() uses cancel_at_period_end for graceful cancellation.

items.title: Client email capture on free tier
items.notes: Shipped — After shared-password auth succeeds, ClientDashboard shows email capture gate (name + email form) before loading dashboard. Email stored via POST /api/public/capture-email/:id to workspace.portalContacts array (deduped by email). localStorage tracks captured email to skip on return visits. Skip button available (stores __skipped__ marker). Backend: portalContacts added to Workspace interface + updateWorkspace type. Captures feed into email marketing funnel for reports, trial nudges, upgrade prompts.

items.title: AI chatbot upgrade prompts with ROI dollar values
items.notes: Shipped — useChat hook fetches ROI data (organicTrafficValue) when chat opens. 429 rate-limit message shows '$X in organic traffic value — Growth pays for itself.' Chat-exhausted bar shows ROI-backed copy with emerald highlight. TierGate accepts optional roiValue prop and displays organic traffic value in upgrade overlays. All best-effort with silent fail if ROI data unavailable.

items.title: "Time saved" metric on admin dashboard
items.notes: Shipped — Added durationMs to TokenUsage interface, tracked in callOpenAI(). getTimeSaved() in openai-helpers.ts uses per-feature human-equivalent minute multipliers (e.g. content-brief=150min, keyword-strategy=240min, schema=60min). GET /api/ai/time-saved?workspaceId=&since= returns totalHoursSaved, operationCount, byFeature breakdown. WorkspaceOverview Command Center shows 'Hours Saved' StatCard (purple Clock icon) with monthly AI ops count. Fetches current month data on load.

items.title: Pre-populate content requests from audit issues
items.notes: Shipped — POST /api/public/content-request/:wsId/from-audit endpoint in public-content.ts. Accepts pageSlug, pageName, issues, wordCount. Auto-enriches with top 5 GSC keywords for the page + keyword strategy target keyword. Creates content request with rich rationale (issues, word count, keywords). HealthTab.tsx shows 'Request Content Improvement' button on expanded pages with content-related issues (thin content, heading, h1). Button → creates request → toast → WebSocket auto-refreshes Content tab.

items.title: Client portal favicon + OG meta tags
items.notes: Shipped — ClientDashboard.tsx dynamically updates document head when workspace loads: og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:card, meta description. brandLogoUrl sets og:image, twitter:image, and dynamic favicon (SVG or PNG). Added brandLogoUrl and brandAccentColor to WorkspaceInfo type.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — AEO — Answer Engine Optimization
sprints.rationale: Beta client feedback: LLMs and AI answer engines cite pages with trust signals, clean structure, and rich schema. Three feature groups: new audit checks, schema expansion, and content brief enhancements.

items.title: AEO Trust Audit: trust pages existence check
items.notes: Shipped — Site-wide check in runSeoAudit(): scans allSlugs for /about, /contact variants. Flags missing trust pages. Recommends /editorial-policy, /corrections, /medical-review-board for healthcare.

items.title: AEO Trust Audit: author/reviewer markup detection
items.source: Beta client AEO feedback A1, D3
items.notes: Shipped — Per-page aeo-author check: detects author meta tag, Person schema, byline/reviewer CSS classes, 'reviewed by' text patterns. Flags pages missing all attribution signals.

items.title: AEO Trust Audit: last-updated date detection
items.source: Beta client AEO feedback A1, C2
items.notes: Shipped — Per-page aeo-date check: detects dateModified in schema, visible 'last updated/reviewed on' text, and <time> elements. Flags pages missing all date signals.

items.title: AEO Trust Audit: answer-first content structure
items.notes: Shipped — Per-page aeo-answer-first check: extracts 200-800 chars after H1, tests first 40 words against generic intro patterns (welcome to, are you looking, if you're). Flags pages opening with fluff instead of direct answers.

items.title: AEO Trust Audit: FAQ without schema detection
items.notes: Shipped — Per-page aeo-faq-no-schema check: detects FAQ headings and 3+ question-mark H2-H4s, then checks for FAQPage JSON-LD. Warns when FAQ content exists without schema markup.

items.title: AEO Trust Audit: hidden content behind UI
items.notes: Shipped — Per-page aeo-hidden-content check: regex matches display:none, aria-hidden=true, accordion-body/tab-pane/collapse/hidden classes on content blocks >100 chars. Warns if >500 chars hidden.

items.title: AEO Trust Audit: citation/reference density
items.notes: Shipped — Per-page aeo-citations check: counts external links excluding social media, then checks for authority domains (.gov, .edu, .org, pubmed, ADA, NIH, CDC, WHO, etc.). Two-tier: flags zero citations AND flags links without authority sources.

items.title: AEO Trust Audit: dark pattern detection
items.notes: Shipped — Per-page aeo-dark-patterns check: detects autoplay on video/audio elements and aggressive modal/popup/overlay/interstitial classes with fixed positioning or display:block/flex in initial HTML.

items.title: Schema: healthcare types (MedicalBusiness, Dentist, Physician, MedicalProcedure)
items.notes: Shipped — Added requirement #17 to schema-suggester.ts prompt: MedicalBusiness/Dentist/Physician/Optician subtypes, MedicalProcedure with procedureType/howPerformed/preparation/followup, Physician with medicalSpecialty/credentials, HowTo for procedural content.

items.title: Schema: HowTo + Dataset types
items.notes: Shipped — Added requirement #18 to schema-suggester.ts: Dataset schema with name, description, distribution, dateModified, creator for data-heavy pages. HowTo covered in #17 healthcare section.

items.title: Schema: author + reviewedBy on Article schemas
items.notes: Shipped — Updated requirement #12 in schema-suggester.ts: Article/BlogPosting ALWAYS includes author Person with credentials. If medical/health reviewer mentioned, adds reviewedBy Person with credentials.

items.title: Schema: sameAs entity linking on Organization
items.notes: Shipped — Added requirement #19 to schema-suggester.ts: sameAs array on Organization node with verified external profiles (Google Business, LinkedIn, Facebook, Yelp, association pages). Only from page content/footer — never fabricated.

items.title: Content Brief: answer-first layout template
items.notes: Shipped — Added AEO RULES block to generateBrief() prompt: ANSWER-FIRST LAYOUT rule requires first outline section to be direct-answer summary (2-3 sentences + bullets). Bans generic intros.

items.title: Content Brief: citation density targets + definition blocks + comparison tables
items.source: Beta client AEO feedback A2, B3, B4
items.notes: Shipped — Added to AEO RULES in brief prompt: citation density targets (1/200w medical, 1/400w business), definition block pattern (Term→Definition→Misconceptions→Related), comparison table guidance (measurable fields, units, footnotes, 'data as of' date).

items.title: Content Brief: citation-worthy tone rules for medical/authority content
items.source: Beta client AEO feedback F1, F2
items.notes: Shipped — Added AEO CITATION-WORTHY WRITING section to WRITING_QUALITY_RULES in content-posts.ts: claim discipline, evidence framing ('according to…'), encyclopedic neutral tone for medical, definition block pattern, comparison content rules.

items.title: Content Brief: new page types (Provider Profile, Procedure Guide, Pricing Page)
items.source: Beta client AEO feedback G2, G3, G4
items.notes: Shipped — Added 3 new PAGE_TYPE_CONFIGS to content-brief.ts: provider-profile (Physician schema, credential-forward, encyclopedic), procedure-guide (MedicalProcedure schema, citation-dense, definition blocks, comparison tables), pricing-page (Dataset schema, methodology section, measurable fields only).

items.title: Schema: wire Knowledge Base into schema generation pipeline
items.notes: Shipped — Added knowledgeBase field to SchemaContext interface. buildSchemaContext() in helpers.ts now reads ws.knowledgeBase + knowledge-docs/ folder files (truncated to 4000 chars). Injected into AI prompt as BUSINESS KNOWLEDGE BASE section with strict 'never fabricate' guard. Schema AI can now use staff credentials, locations, social profiles, association memberships from KB.

items.title: Recommendations: AEO awareness (RecType, insights, products, critical checks)
items.source: Beta client AEO feedback + data pipeline audit
items.notes: Shipped — Added 'aeo' RecType. All aeo-* audit checks now map to dedicated AEO recommendation type via checkToRecType(). Added 8 AEO-specific insight text generators with traffic-aware variants. aeo-author, aeo-answer-first, aeo-trust-pages added to CRITICAL_CHECKS (fix_now on high-traffic pages). AEO product mapping: aeo_page_review ($99) and aeo_site_review ($499).

items.title: AEO Page Review: AI-powered per-page content change recommendations
items.source: Beta client feedback — AEO audit flags issues but doesn't suggest specific content changes
items.notes: Shipped — server/aeo-page-review.ts (GPT-4.1 review engine with 12 change types), routes/aeo-review.ts (single-page + batch + saved review endpoints), AeoReview.tsx (lazy-loaded sub-tab in SeoAudit with summary cards, effort/priority filters, expandable current→suggested diff). Admin-first: agency sees all recommendations, cherry-picks what to action or send to client.

items.title: Fix notification bell tray not opening in admin dashboard
items.source: Bug report — bell positioned bottom-full (opens upward off-screen from top header)
items.notes: Shipped — Changed NotificationBell.tsx dropdown from 'bottom-full left-0 mb-2' to 'top-full right-0 mt-2'. Panel now opens downward and right-aligned from the header bell icon.

items.title: SEO Change Performance Tracker — track pages after meta/description updates, compare GSC before/after
items.source: Admin request — want to see how SEO changes improve page performance over time
items.notes: Shipped — server/seo-change-tracker.ts (persistent change log + GSC before/after comparison), routes/seo-change-tracker.ts (GET changes + GET impact with GSC data), SeoChangeImpact.tsx component in WorkspaceHome. recordSeoChange() hooked into editor, bulk-fix, approval, and job routes. Shows recent changes list with 'Compare GSC Impact' button that fetches before/after clicks, impressions, CTR, position with delta badges.

items.title: Move AI Usage to top nav button in Command Center header
items.source: Admin request — easier access to AI usage dashboard
items.notes: Shipped — AIUsageSection exported from WorkspaceOverview.tsx, rendered as standalone page via 'ai-usage' route in App.tsx. Amber-accented button added to Command Center header alongside Prospect and Roadmap. Removed inline rendering from Command Center body.

items.title: Fix Keyword Difficulty and impressions showing 0 in admin dashboard
items.source: Bug report — KD and volume showing 0 in strategy tab and content briefs
items.notes: Shipped — Display logic fix in KeywordStrategy.tsx: conditionally render volume/difficulty only when > 0. Applied to siteKeywords, pageMap, and secondaryMetrics sections. Client-side already had this logic; admin side was missing it.

items.title: Stylize admin sidebar nav links with per-group color accents
items.source: Admin request — make sidebar more colorful and eye-catching
items.notes: Shipped — Each sidebar group (Analytics=blue, Site Health=emerald, SEO=teal, Content=amber) now has its own active background, text color, icon color, and hover state. Icons show muted group color when inactive, full color when active.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — UX Narrative Audit & CMS Approval Visibility
sprints.rationale: Client-facing UX narrative audit (diagnosis→plan→action arc), CMS approval change visibility, internal links accuracy, command center layout.

items.title: Onboarding wizard: reorder features + actions, fix purple
items.notes: Shipped — Reordered features and suggestedActions arrays in OnboardingWizard.tsx to match diagnosis→plan→action narrative arc. Fixed purple color in suggestedActions to teal (client-facing, no purple).

items.title: Welcome email: reorder feature list
items.notes: Shipped — Reordered welcome email feature list in email-templates.ts to match narrative arc: traffic context before site health diagnosis.

items.title: Strategy tab: Content Opportunities above Quick Wins + fix purple badge
items.notes: Shipped — Swapped Content Opportunities above Quick Wins in StrategyTab.tsx (revenue moment first, then value proof). Fixed purple 'In Review' badge to amber.

items.title: Internal links: body-only link extraction
items.notes: Shipped — internal-links.ts: extract links from content body only (strip nav/header/footer before link scan). Nav links were making every page appear fully linked, so AI found no gaps.

items.title: CMS approval publish safeguard
items.notes: Shipped — server/index.ts: added publishCollectionItems call after updateCollectionItem in approval apply endpoint. Ensures CMS draft changes go live when client applies approved SEO changes.

items.title: CMS Editor: inline approval context + change history
items.notes: Shipped — CmsEditor.tsx: fetches approval batches, builds per-item lookup, shows latest approved/proposed value inline under each CMS item with status badge and date. Collapsible change history for items with multiple past approvals. Admin can see what was changed without leaving the editor.

items.title: Client Inbox: applied batch visibility + CMS field labels
items.notes: Shipped — ApprovalsTab.tsx: applied items now show date applied, batch footer shows applied count + 'All changes live as of [date]'. Field labels handle CMS slugs (slug→title-cased). Types updated: ApprovalItem gains createdAt/updatedAt/collectionId, ApprovalBatch gains updatedAt, field type widened for CMS slugs.

items.title: Command center: single-column workspace rows
items.notes: Shipped — WorkspaceOverview.tsx: replaced 2-column grid with single-column full-width rows. Metrics flow horizontally: Health | Requests | Approvals | Content | SEO Status separated by dividers. Cleaner layout that doesn't cramp data.

items.title: User presence tracking in Command Center
items.notes: Shipped — WebSocket identify/heartbeat presence tracking. GET /api/presence. Green dot + user name on workspace cards.

items.title: Render staging environment blueprint
items.notes: Shipped — render.yaml with prod+staging services, persistent disks, shared env var groups. sync-staging-data.sh helper.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Admin UX Overhaul
sprints.rationale: Admin dashboard UX pass. P0 and P1 items shipped. P2 polish items moved to backlog.

items.title: Collapsible sidebar navigation groups
items.notes: Shipped — Accordion sidebar groups with localStorage persistence.

items.title: Cross-workspace command center enhancements
items.notes: Shipped — Global anomaly banner, priority-sorted attention items, workspace card anomaly badges.

items.title: WorkspaceHome section extraction
items.notes: Shipped — workspace-home/: SeoWorkStatus, ActivityFeed, RankingsSnapshot, ActiveRequestsAnnotations.

items.title: Admin notification bell / global alert badge
items.notes: Shipped — NotificationBell.tsx in sidebar utility bar. Polling every 5min.

items.title: Spotlight / command palette (⌘K)
items.notes: Shipped — CommandPalette.tsx with fuzzy search, keyboard navigation.

items.title: Workspace quick-switch breadcrumb
items.notes: Shipped — Breadcrumb bar with workspace dropdown.

items.title: Client overview page declutter
items.notes: Shipped — Removed AnomalyAlerts, AI Hero Insight, MonthlySummary from overview. Filtered Recent Work timeline. InsightsDigest is single source of insight.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — UX/Architecture Cleanup
sprints.rationale: Address structural debt, eliminate feature duplication, and improve maintainability. Findings from comprehensive UX/UI audit of both dashboards.

items.title: Add ErrorBoundary wrappers around major sections
items.notes: Shipped — ErrorBoundary.tsx component with retry button. Wrapped: Admin main content area, AdminChat, WorkspaceHome InsightsEngine. Client: MonthlySummary, InsightsDigest, InsightsEngine (overview + health), HealthTab, ROIDashboard.

items.title: Break ClientDashboard.tsx into tab-level components
items.notes: Shipped — Extracted all 8 tabs into src/components/client/: OverviewTab, SearchTab, AnalyticsTab, ContentTab, StrategyTab, ApprovalsTab, RequestsTab, PlansTab. ClientDashboard reduced from 3265→1536 lines. Each tab internalizes its own state and helpers.

items.title: Unify client Approvals + Requests + Content into Inbox tab
items.notes: Shipped — Created InboxTab.tsx composing ApprovalsTab, RequestsTab, ContentTab with filter bar (All / SEO Changes / Requests / Content). Unified badge count on tab bar. Replaced 3 separate nav entries with single Inbox tab. Updated Overview action banners to navigate to inbox.

items.title: Slim down client Overview tab
items.notes: Shipped — Removed site health compact card and InsightsEngine from Overview sidebar. Overview now: welcome + action banners + metrics + monthly summary + insights digest + quick questions + activity timeline.

items.title: Remove WorkspaceHome All Tools grid
items.notes: Shipped — Removed All Tools SectionCard and quickLinks array from WorkspaceHome. Cleaned up unused imports (ExternalLink, Image, Gauge, Share2, Swords).

items.title: Split SeoAudit into standalone route components
items.notes: Shipped — Each SEO sub-tool (Editor, Strategy, Redirects, InternalLinks, Schema, ContentBriefs, Competitors, RankTracker) now routes directly from App.tsx. SeoAudit only handles the core audit view. Removed view prop, 8 lazy imports, SubToolFallback, and view-based routing block.

items.title: Extract shared data-fetching hooks
items.notes: Shipped — useAuditSummary(wsId), useSearchData(wsId, days), useGA4Overview(wsId, days) in src/hooks/. Module-level 60s cache, same pattern as usePageEditStates. Wired useAuditSummary into WorkspaceHome. ClientDashboard can adopt incrementally.

items.title: Unify chat into shared ChatPanel component
items.notes: Shipped — ChatPanel.tsx: shared message bubbles, loading dots, input bar, quick questions, teal/purple accent theming. Wired into SearchConsole (~90 lines replaced). AdminChat and ClientDashboard can adopt incrementally.

items.title: Merge client Analytics + Search into unified Performance tab
items.notes: Shipped — Created PerformanceTab.tsx with internal Search/Analytics sub-tabs. Updated ClientDashboard nav, URL params (backward-compat ?tab=search/analytics → performance). All setTab references updated across InsightsDigest, OnboardingWizard.

items.title: Suppression-aware health score recalculation
items.notes: Shipped — applySuppressionsToAudit() helper filters suppressed issues and recalculates page+site scores using same weights as seo-audit.ts. Wired into all 6 data exit points: /api/public/audit-summary, /api/public/audit-detail, /api/reports/:siteId/latest, admin chat context, client chat context, strategy chat context. Suppressed issues no longer appear in any dashboard score, issue list, or AI recommendation.

items.title: SEO edit tracking — teal=live, purple=in-review, yellow=flagged
items.notes: Shipped — seoEditTracking on Workspace model (Record<pageId, {status, updatedAt, fields}>). trackSeoEdit() helper with priority-based status (won't downgrade live→flagged). CRUD + public API endpoints. Auto-wired into 4 flows: SEO save→live, CMS save→live, approval submit→in-review, audit run→flagged. Frontend: SeoEditor colored borders + badge pills + status legend, CmsEditor tracking badges on item rows, SeoAudit tracking borders + badges on page cards. All components optimistically update local state.

items.title: Hide non-sitemap collection pages from content editor + parent slug
items.notes: Shipped — Server fetches sitemap.xml, filters collection items to only those with a matching sitemap URL. Falls back to showing all if sitemap unavailable. Frontend displays full path with parent collection slug (e.g., /locations/houston-midtown instead of /houston-midtown).

items.title: Real-time data updates via WebSocket/SSE
items.notes: Shipped — WebSocket workspace subscriptions: clients send {action:'subscribe',workspaceId} to receive scoped events. Server: broadcastToWorkspace() sends to subscribed clients only. activity-log.ts auto-broadcasts 'activity:new' on every addActivity call via initActivityBroadcast callback. Explicit events: approval:update, approval:applied, request:created, request:update, content-request:created, content-request:update, audit:complete. Frontend: useWorkspaceEvents hook (subscribe/unsubscribe/reconnect). Wired into WorkspaceHome (activity, requests, content, audit) and ClientDashboard (activity, approvals, requests, content, audit). ~4h actual.

items.title: Shared RankTable component
items.notes: Shipped — src/components/shared/RankTable.tsx: positionColor helper, RankHistoryChart (SVG), RankTable (configurable columns), RankChange indicator, RankTrackingSection (chart+table combo). Wired into SearchTab replacing inline implementation.

items.title: Inline AI proactive insight on Overview
items.notes: Shipped — AI hero insight card on Overview with loading state, 'Continue in chat' CTA. Fetches executive summary via fetchInlineInsight for paid tiers.

items.title: Restructure Overview hierarchy
items.notes: Shipped — Overview now: welcome → AI hero insight → action banners → key metrics → monthly activity → insights digest + sidebar.

items.title: Strategy-specific summary cards
items.notes: Shipped — Replaced duplicate Search metrics with Keywords Tracked, Content Gaps, Quick Wins, Not Yet Ranking. Cleaned up unused imports.

items.title: Health tab errors-only default
items.notes: Shipped — Page breakdown defaults to 'error' filter when errors exist. Added page count indicator (X of Y pages).

items.title: Contextual search benchmarks
items.notes: Shipped — Qualitative labels on all 4 Search Health Summary metrics: 'Strong visibility', 'Above average', 'Needs attention', etc.

items.title: ROI teaser on Plans tab
items.notes: Shipped — Free-tier users see ROI teaser card with Traffic Value / Ad Spend Saved / Content ROI preview icons above contact CTA.

items.title: Compact Content Opportunities cards
items.notes: Shipped — Tighter padding, truncated topic, inline pageType+intent badges, 2-line clamped rationale. CTA buttons more prominent.

items.title: Fix Plans 'Ask AI Advisor' CTA
items.notes: Shipped — CTA now calls onOpenChat to open the AI chat directly instead of navigating to Overview.

items.title: AI chat maximize button
items.notes: Shipped — Toggle button in chat header expands from w-96/max-h-500 to w-[600px]/max-h-[700px] with smooth transition. Close resets to compact.

items.title: Group Plans features by category
items.notes: Shipped — Features grouped into FeatureGroups with category headers: Starter (Insights & Data / AI & Tools / Strategy & Content), Growth (Strategy & SEO / Content & ROI / Premium Only), Premium (Competitor Intelligence / Managed SEO / Technical & Content).

items.title: Beta client dashboard (feature flag)
items.notes: Shipped — /client/beta/:workspaceId route with betaMode prop. BetaContext + useBetaMode() hook. Hides: Plans tab, ROI tab, trial badges/banners, upgrade/pricing/Stripe modals, SeoCart, chat usage limits, purchase buttons on fix recommendations + content opportunities. Override effectiveTier to premium. Single codebase — no duplication.

items.title: Beta-safe AI chatbot prompts
items.notes: Shipped — betaMode flag passed to /api/public/search-chat. Conditional system prompt swaps REVENUE HOOKS for BETA RULES: never mention purchasing/pricing/plans/upgrades, frame content gaps as topics not products, collaborative recommendations with hmpsn studio. Skip chat rate limiting in beta. Stronger guardrails: no hallucinated data, no timeline promises, never contradict team.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Dashboard UX Phase 1: Quick Wins
sprints.rationale: Reduce cognitive load on first impression and improve Inbox actionability. Findings from comprehensive client dashboard UX audit.

items.title: Remove duplicate metrics from MonthlySummary
items.notes: Shipped — Stripped metric highlight cards (Visitors, Clicks, Impressions, Site Health) from MonthlySummary since they duplicated StatCards on Overview. MonthlySummary now shows only activity/work done (content requests, briefs delivered, requests completed, SEO batches applied). Removed unused imports and props.

items.title: Personalize Welcome header with dynamic subtitle
items.notes: Shipped — Welcome header now shows client's first name ('Welcome back, Josh') and a dynamic subtitle derived from the most significant data signal: traffic trend, search clicks trend, or site health score. Falls back to generic 'Here are your latest insights'. Added clientUser prop to OverviewTab.

items.title: Add empty states for all Inbox filter views
items.notes: Shipped — Added empty states for Requests filter ('Submit a request and your team will respond here'), Content filter (tier-aware messaging), and All filter ('Your inbox is empty'). Previously only Approvals filter had an empty state.

items.title: Hide data-less tabs for free-tier users
items.notes: Already done — NAV array conditionally includes Strategy, Inbox, and ROI tabs only for paid tiers (isPaid check). No code change needed.

items.title: Add status chips to Inbox section headers
items.notes: Shipped — Inbox 'All' view section headers now show actionability status: 'Waiting on you · N' (amber) for pending approvals and content reviews, 'Team replied · N' (amber) for requests with unread team notes, 'In progress · N' (blue) for active items, 'All reviewed' (green) when no pending approvals.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — SEO Fix Monetization
sprints.rationale: Technical SEO product pricing overhaul and multi-item checkout flow. Clients can now purchase fixes directly from audit results.

items.title: Technical SEO product pricing restructure
items.notes: Shipped — Alt text → $50 flat full-site. Metadata → $20/page or $179/10pg pack. Schema → $39/page or $299/10pg pack. Redirect → $19/redirect. Removed uncapped 'fix all' options. Product keys renamed: schema_site→schema_10, fix_meta_sweep→fix_meta_10. Updated PRODUCT_MAP, StripeSettings defaults, MONETIZATION.md.

items.title: Multi-item SEO fix checkout flow
items.notes: Shipped — useCart hook (localStorage persistence, context provider), SeoCart slide-out drawer (items, quantities, pack upsells, Premium nudge at $500+), FixRecommendations component (maps audit issues to purchasable fixes with smart pricing), OrderStatus component (post-purchase fulfillment tracking), createCartCheckoutSession for multi-item Stripe sessions, /api/stripe/cart-checkout endpoint, /api/public/fix-orders/:wsId endpoint. CartProvider wraps ClientDashboard, SeoCartButton in header.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Quick Wins

items.notes: hasActiveJob guard on 7 job types: seo-audit, schema-generator, keyword-strategy, bulk-compress, bulk-alt, bulk-seo-fix. Returns 409 with existing jobId.
